## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Okta's retail-focused sales enablement and go-to-market strategy, including new artifacts and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX created detailed retail personas, SDR call prep guides, and company-specific briefs to enhance Okta's sales approach](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Rachael is developing a signal-based prioritization system for target accounts, focusing on loyalty programs and security aspects](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [There's a need for a centralized dashboard/UI to make the new sales enablement tools accessible to 300+ SDRs and 400+ AEs](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Collaboration with SDR managers (Tiff and Ross) is planned to refine and implement the new strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

## Topics

### New Sales Enablement Artifacts

  - [Created detailed retail personas breaking down fears, motivations, and trust-building approaches](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Developed company context specific for retail and Auth0, including elevator pitches and ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Produced writing guidelines for retail personas to fuel company briefs and SDR documents](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Generated a comprehensive retail SDR call prep guide with pre-call checklists, persona-specific talk tracks, and objection handling](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### Jersey Mike's Company Brief Example

  - [Demonstrated a personalized company brief for Jersey Mike's (using mock data)](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Includes target persona details, company tech stack, discovery questions, and objection handling](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Highlighted the importance of tying customer identity to security and personalizing the pitch](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

### Signal-Based Account Prioritization

  - [Rachael developed a system to prioritize accounts based on 5 key signals:](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
    1.  Existence of a login system
    2.  Loyalty/reward program
    3.  Mobile app
    4.  Social sign-on
    5.  Recent security incidents
  - [Currently narrowed down 60 accounts to 44 based on loyalty program criteria](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Exploring tools like Common Room for signal analysis and SDR workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)

### Starbucks Win Analysis

  - [Rachael to share confidential Starbucks win analysis, highlighting:](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [8-year delay in launching new loyalty program due to antiquated systems](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Importance of connecting customer data (CDP) with identity management for personalization](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

### Content and Marketing Opportunities

  - [Identified numerous content opportunities from research and customer conversations](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Discussed potential involvement of Marcel (GrowthX) in explaining the content strategy to Okta's VP](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rachael to connect George with Ross (SDR manager) for further insights](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Share Starbucks win analysis and Clay tables/account lists with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide bullet points on website gaps for Rachael to present to her VP](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
  - [Explore integration of GrowthX artifacts with Okta's current systems and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with Tiff (SDR manager) to refine and implement new strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [GrowthX to start working on company briefs for UKI target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ia3mrMYdgtQzg7buhovEsgXbGxYPQ_V2?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
